name: Tealium

auth.notes: V3 APIs exchange Tealium iQ username plus API key for a 30-minute JWT bearer token and region-specific host. Moments API/MCP is for consented profile access.

rateLimits: Endpoint-specific; request-format docs say excess returns 429. Collect HTTP API supports 100 events/second, or 10 bulk calls/second when sending 10 events per call.
pagination: Endpoint-specific; list/read endpoints define supported query parameters in their reference pages.
notes: Generated from the Tier 2/Tier 3 parallel specialist scout wave.
Use source links to refresh endpoint-level details before implementation.
